creator: horus.li@gmail.com
text:
SQL Buddy 1.3.3
Released: January 18, 2011

port:database/sqlbuddy updates to the latest release 1.3.3.

Following files have been touched:

Makefile
- bump the version number
distinfo
- add info about 1.3.3 distfile
pkg-plist
- to suit current sqlbuddy installation

Changes in  SQL Buddy 1.3.3
- 10 new translations have been added: বাংলা, ελληνικά, ภาษาไทย, 한국어, Lietuvių kalba, Shqip, Norsk, Eesti keel, Hrvatski, български език

Fix: patch attached

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: N./A.
